thaBronx3Codes.title: Tha Bronx 3 Codes and Rewards
thaBronx3Codes.intro: Tha Bronx 3 currently has no official redeem-code system. Track real rewards from the Roblox game page, the official Tha Bronx (RP) community, and the official Instagram. Use this section to separate genuine in-game rewards from fake code pages, cash sellers, and script offers.

cards.label: Active Codes
cards.reward: No public code reward is listed on the official Roblox game page.
cards.action: Check the Roblox game page, Tha Bronx (RP) community, and official Instagram before trying any code.

cards.label: Official Reward Sources
cards.reward: Game updates, community notices, and social posts are the safest places to track new rewards.
cards.action: Use the Roblox experience page, the Tha Bronx (RP) community page, and the official Instagram account.

cards.label: Store-Based Boosts
cards.reward: Useful store items include storage and utility boosts such as 2x Bag Space, Extra BackPack, Extra Safe Space, Extra Trunk Space, Extra Wallet Space, LOOTING!, and 2x Mop Job Cash.
cards.action: Prioritize storage or money-support passes before buying expensive combat items.

cards.label: Unsafe Claims
cards.status: Avoid external cash and script claims
cards.reward: Third-party cash drops, marketplace money transfers, exploit scripts, and fake redeem pages are not official rewards.
cards.action: Do not enter account details, install scripts, or pay external sellers for in-game cash.

thaBronx3BeginnerGuide.title: Tha Bronx 3 Beginner Guide
thaBronx3BeginnerGuide.intro: Start from the correct Roblox experience, learn the core city loop, and protect your early cash. The first session is about map awareness, safe money routes, storage planning, and smart movement before committing to expensive combat gear.

steps.title: Join the Correct Roblox Experience
steps.description: Use the Roblox page for THA BRONX 3 by Tha Bronx (RP). Avoid similarly named copies, fake code pages, and off-platform download links.

steps.title: Learn the Core Loop
steps.description: The main loop is open-world movement, money grinding, cars, fighting, and roleplay. Spend the first run learning streets, shops, storage points, and escape routes before buying high-risk items.

steps.title: Start With Low-Risk Cash
steps.description: Use basic work and looting routes before taking fights. The Mop Job is beginner-friendly, while looting routes can pay faster but expose you to other players.

steps.title: Protect Storage First
steps.description: Bag, backpack, wallet, safe, and trunk space matter because carrying too much cash or loot without storage planning makes every death more expensive.

steps.title: Buy Movement Before Flex Items
steps.description: Cars help with travel, escapes, and money routes. A cheap practical vehicle is usually more useful early than a flashy weapon pass you cannot protect.

steps.title: Delay Expensive Combat Purchases
steps.description: Learn recoil, cover, distance, and when to leave a fight before buying high-end guns, switches, or paid weapon options.

steps.title: Ignore Script and Cash Seller Bait
steps.description: Do not use exploit scripts, off-platform cash sellers, or fake reward links. Keep progression inside Roblox and official channels.

thaBronx3MoneyAndJobs.title: Tha Bronx 3 Money and Jobs Guide
thaBronx3MoneyAndJobs.intro: Money is one of the main progression pillars in Tha Bronx 3. Compare safer work, looting routes, storage planning, and high-risk grinding so you can earn steadily without losing progress to bad timing.

methods.bestFor: First-session cash, control practice, and learning safe routines
methods.notes: Works best as a starter method. The 2x Mop Job Cash store item makes this route more efficient.

methods.requirements: Bag space, awareness, and a fast exit route
methods.bestFor: Faster early cash and item collection
methods.notes: Useful after learning the map. Storage boosts such as 2x Bag Space and Extra BackPack make looting routes easier to manage.

methods.method: Cash Machine and Store Robbery Routes
methods.requirements: Timing, escape plan, and combat readiness
methods.bestFor: Players who already understand danger zones and player traffic
methods.notes: Higher-risk money routes should be done after securing storage and movement. Do not carry more than your wallet, safe, or trunk plan can protect.

methods.requirements: A usable vehicle and route knowledge
methods.bestFor: Moving between money spots, escaping pressure, and reducing wasted travel time
methods.notes: Cars improve route speed and survival. Save for practical transport before luxury spending.

methods.requirements: Wallet, backpack, safe, trunk, or bag upgrades
methods.bestFor: Longer sessions where losing cash would slow progression
methods.notes: Extra Wallet Space, Extra Safe Space, Extra Trunk Space, and Extra BackPack support longer money runs.

methods.requirements: Weapon skill, ammo discipline, and quick decision-making
methods.bestFor: Experienced players who can win or leave fights consistently
methods.notes: Do not treat combat as a beginner income method. Weapons cost money and mistakes cost more.

thaBronx3WeaponsTierList.title: Tha Bronx 3 Weapons and Guns Tier List
thaBronx3WeaponsTierList.intro: Tha Bronx 3's store includes paid weapon options, high-capacity guns, drum variants, and beam variants. For beginners, the strongest setup is the one you can afford, protect, reload, and escape with, not the most expensive option on the shelf.

tiers.description: Strong paid combat options built for aggressive PvP pressure, high fire rate, or high-capacity fighting.
Useful gun options with better magazine control, visibility tools, or stronger fight uptime.

entries.name: 60 Round AR
entries.role: Sustained fire with easier pressure control

tiers.description: Useful handgun and drum choices for players who need cheaper, easier, or more compact combat options.

entries.name: P80G26Drum
entries.role: Light backup weapon for short fights

tiers.description: Not weapons, but strongly connected to weapon progression because they help players carry, store, and protect cash or loot.

thaBronx3StoreGuide.title: Tha Bronx 3 Gamepasses and Store Guide
thaBronx3StoreGuide.intro: Tha Bronx 3's store is built around practical utility, vehicle ownership, storage upgrades, and weapon access. Utility passes are the safest first purchases for long-term grinding, while weapon passes suit players who already know the map and danger zones.

passes.name: Extra Safe Space
passes.bestUse: Adds more room for protected storage through safe-based play.
passes.notes: Strong first utility purchase for players who keep backup cash, tools, and weapons.

passes.name: Extra Wallet Space
passes.bestUse: Helps players carry more money before banking or spending.
passes.notes: Best for players doing money routes, bank trips, job grinding, and store runs.

passes.name: Extra BackPack
passes.bestUse: Adds more personal carrying room for tools, food, and loot.
passes.notes: Useful across almost every session because Tha Bronx 3 has jobs, stores, weapons, food, and pickup-based items.

passes.name: Extra Trunk Space
passes.bestUse: Adds more trunk room for moving loot and supplies by car.
passes.notes: Best after owning or regularly using vehicles; less useful for players who still move mostly on foot.

passes.name: 2x Mop Job Cash
passes.bestUse: Improves cash gain from the mop job route.
passes.notes: Good for players who prefer safer job income instead of relying on robbery or PvP routes.

passes.name: 2x Bag Space
passes.bestUse: Boosts cash gain on bank robbery and looting routes.
passes.notes: Best for players who already know how bank and robbery routes work.

passes.name: LOOTING!
passes.bestUse: Lets players take items from other players.
passes.notes: A PvP-focused pass; skip it early if the main goal is stable money, cars, and storage.

passes.name: Lambo
passes.bestUse: Premium vehicle access for faster travel and status-focused play.
passes.notes: Worth considering after utility storage, not before basic survival and money handling.

passes.name: WideBody TRX
passes.bestUse: Paid vehicle option for players who want a truck-style ride.
passes.notes: Pairs naturally with trunk usage and travel-heavy gameplay.

passes.name: BulletProof Tahoe
passes.notes: Track the Roblox store tab for availability changes.

passes.name: Custom Color Wheel
passes.notes: Good after practical upgrades; cosmetics do not replace bag, wallet, safe, or trunk capacity.

passes.name: Weapon-Linked Passes
passes.bestUse: Store items include weapon names such as Glock19 Clear Drum, G2CBeam, M4FLASH, Micro-ARBeam, and AK-Drum.
passes.notes: Buy only when you already understand combat risk, spawn routes, and how to store backups.

thaBronx3MapGuide.title: Tha Bronx 3 Map and Locations Guide
thaBronx3MapGuide.intro: Tha Bronx 3 is an open-world Roblox city game with money grinding, stores, cars, jobs, and danger zones. Use the map by function first: bank money, buy food, learn safe shops, then expand into robberies and higher-risk routes.

locations.name: Car Dealership
locations.area: Northwest section of the main Bronx area
locations.tip: The central stop for vehicle progression and one of the most important early landmarks.

locations.name: Bank
locations.area: North and Highland side, above the Car Dealership
locations.use: Deposit funds and handle money routes.
locations.tip: Bank trips matter after jobs, robberies, and store runs; arrive with a route out.

locations.name: Dirty Money Laundromat
locations.area: Main Bronx western street near the Gunstop block
locations.use: Clean dirty money through money counters.
locations.tip: A core stop for converting dirty money before banking or spending.

locations.name: Bronx Deli
locations.area: Central part of the main Bronx region
locations.use: Buy Chopped Cheese and work the food route.
locations.tip: Good early money path because it combines food access with job income.

locations.name: Dronald's
locations.area: Center-west side of the mainland Bronx
locations.use: Buy coffee, use the mop job route, and access a money machine.
locations.tip: Useful for players who want repeatable job money before taking bigger risks.

locations.name: Gunstop Black
locations.use: Buy from the larger gun shop selection.
locations.tip: A major weapon shop and a natural place to plan storage before carrying expensive items.

locations.name: Gunstop Blue
locations.area: North and Highland side, first street up
locations.use: Buy from a smaller weapon selection.
locations.tip: Good secondary weapon stop when moving through the north side.

locations.name: Gun Supplier
locations.area: White cabin east on the southernmost highway
locations.use: Buy higher-tier and more expensive weapons.
locations.tip: Treat it as a riskier supply run, not a casual shopping walk.

locations.name: Studio
locations.area: Gas station area on the west side of Mainland Bronx
locations.use: Access exclusive and gamepass-linked weapon options.
locations.tip: Useful after checking the store and deciding which paid weapon routes match your playstyle.

locations.name: Zotic Shop
locations.use: Buy tools, ingredients, and special shop items.
locations.tip: A strong utility stop for players doing crafting, food, and resource routes.

locations.name: Soda Pop Store
locations.area: Upper area of Mainland Bronx, inside a building upstairs
locations.use: Buy Sugar Bags and Fiji Water for Soda Pop cooking.
locations.tip: Mark it for ingredient routes so players can find cooking supplies quickly.

locations.name: Roof Shop
locations.area: Left doorway inside the same building as the Soda Pop Store
locations.use: Buy drills, C4, craft items, and access marketplace features.
locations.tip: Pairs with higher-risk routes, so prepare storage before carrying expensive tools.

locations.name: Dripstore
locations.area: Center-north mainland Bronx near the Car Dealership
locations.tip: Cosmetic stop; visit after core money, food, and storage needs are handled.

locations.name: Medical Center
locations.area: Start of the highway in the South Bronx region
locations.use: Heal injuries after combat or risky routes.
locations.tip: Keep it in mind before pushing south-side routes or returning from fights.

locations.name: Warehouse
locations.use: Spawn a truck and run warehouse-style transport routes.
locations.tip: A practical route for travel and earning, but do not treat the truck like a magic shield.

locations.name: On the Radar
locations.tip: Bring only what you can afford to risk and store backups before starting.

thaBronx3CarsAndStorage.title: Tha Bronx 3 Cars and Storage Guide
thaBronx3CarsAndStorage.intro: Vehicles matter because Tha Bronx 3 spreads jobs, shops, banks, and danger zones across the city. Storage matters even more: bag, wallet, trunk, safe, and backpack upgrades decide how much you can carry, move, and protect between runs.

vehicles.name: Car Dealership
vehicles.storageRole: Pairs with trunk storage and faster travel between shops, jobs, and banks.
vehicles.notes: Make this the first vehicle landmark before chasing paid vehicle passes.

vehicles.name: Warehouse Truck
vehicles.use: Move through warehouse-style transport and furniture routes.
vehicles.storageRole: Useful for moving items during route-based grinding.
vehicles.notes: Good for players who need transport before buying a permanent car.

vehicles.name: 2010 Escalade
vehicles.storageRole: Works as an early travel upgrade before premium cars.
vehicles.notes: A practical first owned car for players building stable routes.

vehicles.name: 1500Chev
vehicles.storageRole: Helps with job routes, store runs, and city movement.
vehicles.notes: Useful when the goal is function before cosmetic or premium spending.

vehicles.name: Lambo
vehicles.storageRole: Travel-focused value; combine with trunk storage if the route involves loot movement.
vehicles.notes: Better after buying practical storage upgrades.

vehicles.name: WideBody TRX
vehicles.notes: Best for players who already use cars often.

vehicles.name: BulletProof Tahoe
vehicles.notes: Track the official Roblox Store tab for availability.

vehicles.name: Extra Trunk Space
vehicles.storageRole: Best for carrying loot, supplies, and route items by car.
vehicles.notes: More useful after owning or regularly using cars.

vehicles.name: Extra BackPack
vehicles.storageRole: Helps carry tools, food, and small items without relying on a vehicle.
vehicles.notes: One of the most flexible upgrades for new and returning players.

vehicles.name: Extra Wallet Space
vehicles.storageRole: Supports bank trips, shop runs, and job routes.
vehicles.notes: Useful before buying expensive gear or vehicles.

vehicles.name: Extra Safe Space
vehicles.storageRole: Keeps backup items and money safer between risky trips.
vehicles.notes: Best storage-first upgrade for players who grind long sessions.

thaBronx3OfficialLinks.title: Tha Bronx 3 Updates and Official Links Tracker
thaBronx3OfficialLinks.intro: Tha Bronx 3 has many unofficial code pages, cash sellers, and script pages around it. This tracker keeps the front page focused on official Roblox and official social sources so you always reach the real game.

panels.label: Official Roblox Experience
panels.summary: Play Tha Bronx 3 from the Roblox experience page.
panels.content: The official experience is THA BRONX 3 by Tha Bronx (RP). The Roblox description frames it as an open-world action and roleplay game with money, grind, city, cars, fighting, shooting, and friends-based play.

panels.label: Roblox Store Tab
panels.summary: Check paid passes and current availability inside Roblox.
panels.content: Use the Store tab for gamepasses such as storage upgrades, wallet upgrades, trunk space, vehicle passes, weapon-linked passes, and cosmetic options. Prices and sale status should be checked on Roblox before purchase.

panels.label: Roblox Servers Tab
panels.summary: Open public servers directly from Roblox.
panels.content: Use the Roblox Servers tab when choosing a public server instead of following random third-party server links.

panels.label: Creator Community
panels.summary: Follow the official Roblox community tied to the creator.
panels.content: Tha Bronx (RP) is the creator community shown from the Roblox experience page. Use it to confirm creator identity before trusting social links or community claims.

panels.label: Official Instagram
panels.summary: Track public update posts from the official Instagram profile.
panels.content: The Instagram profile @thabronx2official describes itself as the official Tha Bronx 3 account and posts update clips and announcements.

panels.label: Update Showcase Videos
panels.summary: Use video showcases to see new blocks, guns, cars, and update changes in action.
panels.content: Update showcase videos are useful for seeing map changes, new vehicles, store items, and gameplay routes before spending Robux or in-game cash.

panels.label: Safe Link Rule
panels.summary: Use Roblox purchases, not third-party cash or script offers.
panels.content: Official purchases happen through Roblox. Do not use cash-drop sellers, marketplace item transfers, executor scripts, dupe pages, or fake code pages for Tha Bronx 3.

panels.label: What to Track After Updates
panels.summary: Review the same core areas after every update.
panels.content: After each update, check the experience title, store tab, servers tab, official community, Instagram posts, and recent gameplay showcases. Important player-facing changes usually affect gamepasses, weapons, cars, shops, map zones, jobs, or money routes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Tha Bronx 3 on Roblox

questions.question: What is Tha Bronx 3?
questions.answer: Tha Bronx 3 is a Roblox open-world action roleplay game by Tha Bronx (RP), built around money grinding, cars, fighting, shooting, and store-based upgrades in a city setting.

questions.question: Are there active codes for Tha Bronx 3?
questions.answer: Tha Bronx 3 currently has no official redeem-code system. Track real rewards from the Roblox game page, the Tha Bronx (RP) community, and the official Instagram, and avoid fake code pages and cash sellers.

questions.question: How do I make money fast in Tha Bronx 3?
questions.answer: Start with the beginner-friendly Mop Job and looting routes, then add storage upgrades. Higher-risk routes like robberies and combat looting are best left until you understand the map, escape routes, and danger zones.

questions.question: Is Tha Bronx 3 free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Tha Bronx 3 is free to play on Roblox. The in-game store offers optional gamepasses for storage, vehicles, job boosts, and weapon-linked items, but none are required to start playing.

questions.question: What are the best storage upgrades in Tha Bronx 3?
questions.answer: Extra Wallet Space, Extra BackPack, Extra Safe Space, and Extra Trunk Space are the most useful early upgrades. They let you carry, move, and protect more cash and loot across longer money runs.

questions.question: Where can I find official Tha Bronx 3 updates?
questions.answer: Check the official Roblox experience page, the Store tab, the Servers tab, the Tha Bronx (RP) creator community, and the official Instagram for update posts and gameplay showcases.
